name: The Serpent
oracleText:
Deathtouch
Whenever The Serpent attacks, defending player may draw a card. If that player does, they lose 2 life and you put a +1/+1 counter on The Serpent.
Whenever an opponent draws their second card each turn, they lose 2 life.
flavorText: "Now the serpent was more subtil than any beast of the field." — Genesis 3:1
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses Lucas Cranach's "The Fall of Man" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Whisperer in the Garden
